description: Reconcile completion vs. status across surfaces. The UI's free item status dropdown (PATCH vision item) can silently diverge from the CLI's commit-SHA-bound `record-completion` (feature.json completions[]). Surface the recorded completion (commit SHA + tests-pass) next to the status control and either gate UI status changes behind a binding or flag the divergence. Closes the highest-risk consistency hole between vision-state.json and feature.json.
